title: athyrium × drepanopteroides
intro: Athyrium × drepanopteroides, also known as Lady Fern, is a hybrid fern species that belongs to the Athyrium genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Athyrium × drepanopteroides include reducing swelling and pain, treating urinary tract infections, and helping to manage blood pressure. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or capsules.
